LMNR.settings.skillDicePool.name: Dice Pool Skill Resolution
LMNR.settings.skillDicePool.hint: When enabled, skill checks will roll a number of d6 equal to the skill rank instead of a single d20.
LMNR.settings.showPilotStress.name: Always Show Pilot Stress
LMNR.settings.showPilotStress.hint: When enabled, a pilot's Stress track is shown and editable on the pilot sheet even before a Bond is added.
LMNR.pilotStress.label: Stress
LMNR.pilotStress.tooltip: Pilot Stress. Accessable without a Bond via the Motley Narrative Rules module.
LMNR.settings.showPilotBurdens.name: Always Show Pilot Burdens
LMNR.settings.showPilotBurdens.hint: When enabled, a pilot with no Bond shows a Burdens section with three fixed trackers (lengths 4, 6 and 10) whose name and fill are editable; the trackers cannot be deleted or resized. Once a Bond is added, the system's own Burdens section takes over (the trackers' saved state returns if the Bond is removed).
LMNR.card.heading: Skill Check
LMNR.display.itemReadoutTooltip: Skill trigger contributes +{rank}d6 to the dice pool (the base 1d6 is implicit).
